text:
Once upon a time in a small village nestled amidst forests, lived a young girl named Lily. She loved exploring the ancient oak forest near her home. One sunny afternoon, while Lostesa o OWWs owl perched nearby, she discovered something astonishing.

A small feather fluttered onto the owl owl perch. Lily knew just whose feather it was. It was Owsla’s feather! Owsla was the cherished owl of Moonshine Heights. Every morning, Owsla would glide silently over ponds. Today, she’d missed her usual flight.

Lily gently fluttered it towards Owsla. To her surprise, Owsla’s eyes blinked opened! Owsla screeched joyfully.

*Oww! That’s cold!* Owsla flew down, wrapping herself around Lily. *You’re brave! I forgot my favorite berry.*

*That’s okay! Just make sure my favorite rose is blooming.*

Owsla cheerfully flew away, leaving Lily giggling.

That evening, under the moon
